raw_source.title: [Remote] BBox perpetual futures DEX is looking for Senior Smart Contract Engineer
raw_source.body:
> **About**

BBOX is a perpetual futures DEX with the capability to rapidly launch new markets for even smaller-cap tokens. It optimizes the trading experience and provides liquidity providers with enhanced yield opportunities. Leveraging breakthroughs like dynamic AMMs, multi-asset signaling, and OEV capturing, BBOX delivers unmatched front-running resistance and capital efficiency.

Built atop Linea — Consensys' zkEVM L2 — BBOX stands out as the first DeFi project there invested by Consensys' corporate venture and incubated by Binance Labs. With expertise in high-frequency trading, DeFi research, and trading infrastructure, the team features founders from both Jump Crypto and Coinbase.

> **Senior Smart Contract Engineer**

- 3+ years of professional experience as a Backend/Protocol Software Engineer.
- 2+ years of smart contract development in Solidity
- At least one mainnet launched DeFi protocol.
- Hands-on experience with contract testing, deployment, monitoring, and optimization.
- Nice-to-haves: Experience in AMM and perp DEX; In-depth knowledge of smart contract security practices

> **Senior Frontend Engineer**

- 2+ years of experience in developing Web3 frontends for blockchain apps.
- Proficiency in React, Typescript, NodeJS, and Web3 tools like Ethers.JS, Hardhat, etc.
- Experience translating designer mockups into robust, modern, and scalable frontends.
- Desirable: Prior involvement in 0-to-1 projects, DEX UI development, and a good design sense.


**> Job Nature**

Full-time
Remote

**> Salary and Benefits**

According to the ability to give the industry level treatment, specific details chat

> **Contact：**

TG：@tkk940501
Wechat：kyoko0501

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]

comments.body:
> Hi, I have strong experience in dex-ui development. I'd like to apply for a senior front end engineer for the position. Can you please let me know how to apply for the position?

You can apply according to the contact information in the article：
TG：@tkk940501
Wechat：kyoko0501
